title: A 12-Year-Old Boy on a Field Trip Found Giant 80-Million-Year-Old Fossil Bones Hidden Beneath Kansas Rocks
description: Buried beneath Kansas rocks for millions of years, an ancient fossil remained hidden until a 12-year-old boy made an unexpected discovery during a routine field trip.

title: Colombia's presidential runoff could impact the future of the Amazon rainforest and fossil fuels
description: Colombia’s presidential runoff between Iván Cepeda, an ally of President Gustavo Petro, and lawyer Abelardo de la Espriella, who has been endorsed by U.S. President Donald Trump, could have major implications for the Amazon rainforest, fossil fuel development and Indigenous communities.

title: Colombia's presidential runoff could impact the future of the Amazon rainforest and fossil fuels
